about.text: Welcome to my world of art and visual storytelling. I create paintings and mixed-media works that explore the intersection of emotion, color, and form. Each piece is a conversation between intention and intuition — a search for meaning in texture, light, and movement.

otherWork.title: Digital Series I
otherWork.description: A digital exploration of texture and light.

otherWork.title: Photography
otherWork.description: Analog film photography exploring urban landscapes.
